notes: M7 baseline: 130 symbols / 5yr. 2 of 3 trades stopped out same-bar; all 3 entered via trigger bypass. Funnel cols from the Phase-0 long-only default-config re-run (d2e6879, reproduced the exact same 3 trades): 346 long qualifications -> 15 trigger coincidences -> 5 killed by bias 2-bar hold -> 10 bypasses -> 7 killed by confirm-trigger quality -> 3 filled. dip_armed 0 (Path B measured dead). M7's shorts-enabled study runs saw 747 qualifications across both books.
